'''鈭歡-d-m-th''' ('''kagadmethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbandage|unbandage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-d-m-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbandage|unbandage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-d-m-th
|-
! Lemma
| kagadmethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigadmethoko|thigadmethoko]] || [[word:jigadmethoko|jigadmethoko]] || [[word:shigadmethoko|shigadmethoko]] || [[word:kigadmethoko|kigadmethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugadmethoko|thuthugadmethoko]] || [[word:jujugadmethoko|jujugadmethoko]] || [[word:shushugadmethoko|shushugadmethoko]] || [[word:kukugadmethoko|kukugadmethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugadmethoko|thugadmethoko]] || [[word:jugadmethoko|jugadmethoko]] || [[word:shugadmethoko|shugadmethoko]] || [[word:kugadmethoko|kugadmethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugadmethoko|thugadmethoko]] || [[word:jugadmethoko|jugadmethoko]] || [[word:shugadmethoko|shugadmethoko]] || [[word:kugadmethoko|kugadmethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegadmethoko|thegadmethoko]] || [[word:jegadmethoko|jegadmethoko]] || [[word:shegadmethoko|shegadmethoko]] || [[word:kegadmethoko|kegadmethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogadmethoko|thothogadmethoko]] || [[word:jojogadmethoko|jojogadmethoko]] || [[word:shoshogadmethoko|shoshogadmethoko]] || [[word:kokogadmethoko|kokogadmethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogadmethoko|thogadmethoko]] || [[word:jogadmethoko|jogadmethoko]] || [[word:shogadmethoko|shogadmethoko]] || [[word:kogadmethoko|kogadmethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogadmethoko|thogadmethoko]] || [[word:jogadmethoko|jogadmethoko]] || [[word:shogadmethoko|shogadmethoko]] || [[word:kogadmethoko|kogadmethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gadmethoko|th忙gadmethoko]] || [[word:j忙gadmethoko|j忙gadmethoko]] || [[word:sh忙gadmethoko|sh忙gadmethoko]] || [[word:k忙gadmethoko|k忙gadmethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagadmethoko|thathagadmethoko]] || [[word:jajagadmethoko|jajagadmethoko]] || [[word:shashagadmethoko|shashagadmethoko]] || [[word:kakagadmethoko|kakagadmethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagadmethoko|thagadmethoko]] || [[word:jagadmethoko|jagadmethoko]] || [[word:shagadmethoko|shagadmethoko]] || [[word:kagadmethoko|kagadmethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagadmethoko|thagadmethoko]] || [[word:jagadmethoko|jagadmethoko]] || [[word:shagadmethoko|shagadmethoko]] || [[word:kagadmethoko|kagadmethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagadmethithi|shagadmethithi]] || [[word:shagadmethiji|shagadmethiji]] || [[word:shagadmethishi|shagadmethishi]] || [[word:shagadmethiki|shagadmethiki]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagadmeth茂f|shagadmeth茂f]] || [[word:shagadmeth茂f|shagadmeth茂f]] || [[word:shagadmeth茂f|shagadmeth茂f]] || [[word:shagadmeth茂f|shagadmeth茂f]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagadmeth茂f|shagadmeth茂f]] || [[word:shagadmeth茂f|shagadmeth茂f]] || [[word:shagadmeth茂f|shagadmeth茂f]] || [[word:shagadmeth茂f|shagadmeth茂f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagadmeth忙th忙|shagadmeth忙th忙]] || [[word:shagadmeth忙j忙|shagadmeth忙j忙]] || [[word:shagadmeth忙sh忙|shagadmeth忙sh忙]] || [[word:shagadmeth忙k忙|shagadmeth忙k忙]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
